title: Stray dogs case: Supreme Court pulls up states, UTs over poor infra, says ‘No sustained effort to tackle crisis’
content:
The Supreme Court has expressed strong displeasure with states and Union Territories (UTs).
*   The criticism is directed at their inadequate infrastructure for managing stray dogs.
*   The court stated there has been "no sustained effort" to effectively address the stray dog crisis.

title: Paramotor Digital Technology files confidentially with SEBI for IPO
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Paramotor Digital Technology is planning an Initial Public Offering (IPO).
*   The company has submitted its IPO application to SEBI (Securities and Exchange Board of India).
*   This filing process was carried out confidentially.

title: Youth Congress leaders, workers fight amongst themselves at KPCC office
content:
Youth Congress leaders and workers engaged in a fight.
*   The altercation occurred amongst themselves at the KPCC office.
*   The incident highlights internal discord within the Youth Congress.
